title: Lands to which applicable
doc_html:
§924. Lands to which applicable

           The authority given by this Subpart shall apply to all sixteenth sections donated by the Congress of the United States to the State of Louisiana in trust for public school purposes, and to which the state has never legally parted with the title.
doc_text:
§924.  Lands to which applicable
The authority given by this Subpart shall apply to all sixteenth sections
donated by the Congress of the United States to the State of Louisiana in trust
for public school purposes, and to which the state has never legally parted with
the title.
